violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Veggie cutter was observed in the hand-washing sink located in warewashing area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (100) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Prep sink located in the (3-bay sink) area was not in good repair. Observed faucet detached from sink at time of inspection. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (super san food service sanitizer) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). Per interview of PIC strips are on order. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Prep sink drain is to be adjusted to have a proper air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Observed a couch and equipment in back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair. Tiles were observed to be chipping/peeling located in 3-bay sink area of kitchen and front lobby. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Prep sink drain is to be adjusted to have a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair. Tiles were observed to be chipping/peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the walk-in cooler area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is licensed/registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

Several Food Items in the walk-in cooler were observed held at 43-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Cheese observed at 43 degrees Fahrenheit was moved to colder refrigeration, and food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit or higher were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The walk-in cooler was observed to be in poor repair at the time of inspection. The ambient temperature was observed to be maintained at 50 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 43 - 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Per management, refrigeration technician was called and is to arrive same day. Walk-in cooler is not to be used for storage of TCS foods until serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Prep sink drain is to be adjusted to have a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - The walk-in cooler floor - Walls behind equipment - Ceiling tiles adjacent to air vents The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the walk-in cooler area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair. Tiles were observed to be chipping/peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
